description_long: This object is a decorative candelabrum featuring two twisted red candles held in ornate black metal holders. The base is round and sturdy, adorned with intricate detailing and a slightly raised edge. Two elegantly curved arms extend from the central stem, each supporting a candle holder with a flared lip. The metalwork is dark, likely wrought iron or painted steel, with a classic, slightly antique finish. The candles themselves are tall, slender, and vividly red, with a spiral design running along their length. The overall design suggests a blend of vintage and urban aesthetics, suitable for outdoor or indoor decorative use.
description: A black metal candelabrum with two twisted red candles, featuring ornate detailing and curved arms. The design is both vintage and urban, with a sturdy round base.
description_view_0: Front view showing a single red twisted candle in the central holder, with the ornate base and part of the curved arms visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both red twisted candles in their holders, with the full span of the curved arms and the round base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the single central candle and the back of the ornate base and arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing both red twisted candles and the full width of the candelabrum's arms.
